TextView.android:text: Pick the closest match — it helps buyers find your item and unlocks the right details to fill in.
Show your product clearly — listings with photos get more views.
Max 30MB, up to 1280×1280px. 10 to 60 seconds, MP4 format.
Fill in more to boost search exposure.
Set your price, stock, and any bulk pricing tiers.
Enable at least one courier — a listing needs at least one shipping option to publish.
